en: And the fifth angel blew his trumpet, and I saw a star fallen from heaven to earth, and he was given the key to the shaft of the bottomless pit.
zh: 第五位天使吹號，我就看見一顆星從天上落到地上，有無底坑的鑰匙賜給它。

en: He opened the shaft of the bottomless pit, and from the shaft rose smoke like the smoke of a great furnace, and the sun and the air were darkened with the smoke from the shaft.
zh: 它開了無底坑，就有煙從坑裡冒出來，好像大火爐的煙，太陽和天空因這坑的煙就都變黑了。

en: Then from the smoke came locusts on the earth, and they were given power like the power of scorpions of the earth.
zh: 有蝗蟲從煙裡出來到了地上；有能力賜給牠們，好像地上蠍子的能力一樣。

en: They were told not to harm the grass of the earth or any green plant or any tree, but only those people who do not have the seal of God on their foreheads.
zh: 有話吩咐牠們，不可傷害地上的草，和所有青翠的東西，以及所有的樹木，只可傷害那些額上沒有 神印記的人。

en: They were allowed to torment them for five months, but not to kill them, and their torment was like the torment of a scorpion when it stings someone.
zh: 蝗蟲沒有能力殺死他們，只可使他們受痛苦五個月。他們的痛苦就像人給蠍子螫了的痛苦一樣。

en: And in those days people will seek death and will not find it. They will long to die, but death will flee from them.
zh: 在那些日子，人要求死，卻決不得死；切願要死，死卻遠離他們。

en: In appearance the locusts were like horses prepared for battle: on their heads were what looked like crowns of gold; their faces were like human faces,
zh: 蝗蟲的形象，好像是預備好了要上陣的戰馬一樣。牠們頭上戴的好像金冠冕，臉像人的面孔，

en: their hair like women's hair, and their teeth like lions' teeth;
zh: 牠們的頭髮好像女人的頭髮，牙齒好像獅子的牙齒；

en: they had breastplates like breastplates of iron, and the noise of their wings was like the noise of many chariots with horses rushing into battle.
zh: 牠們的胸甲像鐵甲，牠們翅膀的聲音好像許多馬車奔馳上陣的聲音。

en: They have tails and stings like scorpions, and their power to hurt people for five months is in their tails.
zh: 牠們好像蠍子一樣有尾巴和毒刺，牠們的尾巴能傷害人五個月。

en: They have as king over them the angel of the bottomless pit. His name in Hebrew is Abaddon, and in Greek he is called Apollyon.
zh: 牠們有無底坑的使者作王統治牠們。這王的名字，希伯來話叫阿巴頓，希臘話叫阿波倫。

en: The first woe has passed; behold, two woes are still to come.
zh: 第一樣災禍過去了。看哪，以後還有兩樣災禍要來！

en: Then the sixth angel blew his trumpet, and I heard a voice from the four horns of the golden altar before God,
zh: 第六位天使吹號，我聽見有一個聲音從 神面前金壇的四角發出來，

en: saying to the sixth angel who had the trumpet, "Release the four angels who are bound at the great river Euphrates."
zh: 對拿著號筒的第六位天使說：“把捆綁在幼發拉底大河的那四個使者放了吧！”

en: So the four angels, who had been prepared for the hour, the day, the month, and the year, were released to kill a third of mankind.
zh: 那四個使者就被釋放了，他們已經預備好，要在某年某月某日某時殺害人類的三分之一。

en: The number of mounted troops was twice ten thousand times ten thousand; I heard their number.
zh: 馬兵的數目有二萬萬；他們這個數目我聽見了。

en: And this is how I saw the horses in my vision and those who rode them: they wore breastplates the color of fire and of sapphire and of sulfur, and the heads of the horses were like lions' heads, and fire and smoke and sulfur came out of their mouths.
zh: 在異象中，我看見那些馬和騎馬的是這樣：騎馬的穿著火紅紫青和硫磺色的胸甲，馬的頭好像獅子頭，有火、煙和硫磺從馬的口中噴出來。

en: By these three plagues a third of mankind was killed, by the fire and smoke and sulfur coming out of their mouths.
zh: 馬口中噴出來的火、煙和硫磺這三種災害，殺死了人類的三分之一。

en: For the power of the horses is in their mouths and in their tails, for their tails are like serpents with heads, and by means of them they wound.
zh: 馬的能力是在口中和尾巴上。牠們的尾巴像蛇，並且有頭用來傷人。

en: The rest of mankind, who were not killed by these plagues, did not repent of the works of their hands nor give up worshiping demons and idols of gold and silver and bronze and stone and wood, which cannot see or hear or walk,
zh: 其餘沒有在這些災難中被殺的人，仍然不為他們手所作的悔改，還是去拜鬼魔和那些金、銀、銅、石頭、木頭做的，不能看、不能聽、也不能走路的偶像。

en: nor did they repent of their murders or their sorceries or their sexual immorality or their thefts.
zh: 他們也不為自己的兇殺、邪術、淫亂和偷盜悔改。
